# Contributing

<!-- Generated by seed-golden-context | Last updated: 2026-05-11 -->

## Prerequisites

| Tool | Version | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| PHP | ^8.0 (8.0, 8.1, 8.2, 8.3, 8.4 all tested in CI) | Must match the constraint in `composer.json` |
| Composer | 2.x | [Install Composer](https://getcomposer.org/download/) |

No Docker, no Node.js, no `.nvmrc`. This is a pure PHP library.

## Getting Started

```bash
# Clone
git clone git@github.com:contentful/rich-text.php.git
cd rich-text.php

# Install dependencies (including dev dependencies for testing)
composer install

# Run the full test suite
composer test

# Run tests, stopping immediately on first error or failure
composer test-quick-fail
```

## Development Workflow

This library has no build step or watch mode — edit source in `src/`, run tests, repeat.

```bash
# Run all tests
composer test

# Run tests with fast-fail (stops on first error/failure, verbose output)
composer test-quick-fail

# Run static analysis (PHPStan level 5)
composer lint-static-analysis

# Check for backward-compatibility breaks against the latest release
composer test-for-bc-breaks
```

### Adding a New Node Type

1. Add a `Node` class in `src/Node/` implementing `NodeInterface`.
2. Add a `NodeMapper` in `src/NodeMapper/` implementing `NodeMapperInterface`. Register it in `Parser::createMappers()`.
3. Add a `NodeRenderer` in `src/NodeRenderer/` implementing `NodeRendererInterface`. Register it in `Renderer::createNodeRenderers()`.
4. Add unit tests under `tests/Unit/`.
5. Add or update integration test fixtures under `tests/Fixtures/`.
6. Update the `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`.

## Testing

- **Framework:** PHPUnit ^8.5
- **Config:** `phpunit.xml.dist`
- **Test suites:**
  - `integration` — `tests/Integration/` — end-to-end rendering, including Twig and Plates bridge tests
  - `unit` — `tests/Unit/` — per-class unit tests
- **Run all:** `composer test`
- **Run all (fast-fail):** `composer test-quick-fail`
- **Run a single suite:** `vendor/bin/phpunit --testsuite integration` or `--testsuite unit`
- **Coverage output:** `build/coverage/` (HTML) and `build/logs/clover.xml`

Integration tests use JSON fixtures from `tests/Fixtures/`. When adding support for a new node type, add a corresponding fixture file and integration test.

## Code Style

This repo uses `php-cs-fixer`. The linter is **not** in `composer.json` — it is installed separately on CI in a `tools/` directory (see `.circleci/config.yml`):

```bash
mkdir -p tools/php-cs-fixer
composer require --working-dir=tools/php-cs-fixer friendsofphp/php-cs-fixer

# Check for style violations (dry run)
tools/php-cs-fixer/vendor/bin/php-cs-fixer fix --dry-run --stop-on-violation -v

# Auto-fix violations
tools/php-cs-fixer/vendor/bin/php-cs-fixer fix
```

Config file: `scripts/php-cs-fixer.php` (at `.php-cs-fixer.php` symlink or direct path — see CI config).

## Static Analysis

```bash
# PHPStan at level 5
composer lint-static-analysis
```

PHPStan config: `phpstan.neon`.

## Backward Compatibility

This library follows [Semantic Versioning](https://semver.org/). Public interfaces (`ParserInterface`, `RendererInterface`, `NodeInterface`, `NodeMapperInterface`, `NodeRendererInterface`) are part of the public API. **Breaking changes to public interfaces require a major version bump.**

CI runs an automated BC check on every push:

```bash
# Check for BC breaks against the published Packagist release
composer test-for-bc-breaks
```

## Commit Convention

Commits broadly follow Conventional Commits-style prefixes but are not strictly enforced by a hook. Use descriptive commit messages with a scope where helpful:

```
feat(nodes): add strikethrough mark
fix(parser): restore locale on EmbeddedAssetBlock
chore: update CI for PHP 8.4
docs: update README rendering examples
```

## Branch Strategy

- `master` — default and release branch. All PRs target `master`.
- Feature branches — use `feat/`, `fix/`, `chore/`, `docs/` prefixes, e.g., `feat/superscript-subscript`.

## Release Process

Releases are prepared manually using the shared Contentful release script:

```bash
composer release
```

This runs `vendor/contentful/core/scripts/release.php`, which handles version bumping, CHANGELOG finalization, and tagging. After the release commit is pushed and the tag is created, Packagist picks up the new version automatically via the GitHub webhook.

## Pull Requests

- Target `master`.
- CI runs on CircleCI: syntax lint, static analysis, BC check, and tests on PHP 8.0–8.4.
- CodeQL security analysis runs via GitHub Actions (`.github/workflows/codeql.yml`).
- All CI checks must pass before merge.
- Include a `CHANGELOG.md` entry under `[Unreleased]` for user-facing changes.

## CI/CD

| Job | Trigger | What it does |
|---|---|---|
| `lintSyntax` | Every push/PR | Runs `php-cs-fixer` in dry-run mode; fails if any file needs formatting |
| `lintStaticAnalysis` | Every push/PR | Runs PHPStan at level 5 against `src/` |
| `checkBcBreaks` | Every push/PR | Runs `roave/backward-compatibility-check` against latest release (non-blocking: `|| true`) |
| `test80`–`test84` | Every push/PR | Runs the full PHPUnit suite on PHP 8.0, 8.1, 8.2, 8.3, and 8.4 |
| `codeql` | Push to master / PRs | GitHub CodeQL security analysis |

CI alerts are routed to the `#sdk-bots` Slack channel (see `catalog-info.yaml`).
